content.full_text:
June 25, 2001

Douglas P. Haubert
Attorney at Law
18301 Von Karman Avenue, Suite 1050
Irvine, CA 92612

Dear Mr. Haubert:

Your letter requesting advice under the Political Reform Act was received via facsimile on June 13, 2001 by the Fair Political Practices Commission.

Please note that the Political Reform Act (the "Act") requires the Commission to provide formal written advice to any person whose duties under the Act are in question or to that person's authorized representative (Section 83114(b).) The Commission does not provide advice to third parties regarding a public official's duties under the Act (2 Cal. Code Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), copy enclosed). Consequently, we are unable to provide assistance with respect to the issue you raise in your letter.

Your request for documents under the California Public Records Act has been addressed under separate cover.

If you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca,
General Counsel

By: Kelly L. Winsor
Legal Analyst

Enclosure

1 Government Code sections 81000 – 91014.
